info.description: Robinhood Markets, Inc is a financial services platform, which engages in the provision of retail brokerage and offers trading in U.S. listed stocks and Exchange Traded Funds, related options, and cryptocurrency trading, as well as cash management, which includes debit cards services. The company was founded by Vladimir Tenev and Baiju Prafulkumar Bhatt in 2013 and is headquartered in Menlo Park, CA.
info.description_zh: Robinhood Markets, Inc 是一家金融服務平台，從事提供零售經紀業務，並提供美國上市股票和交易所交易基金、相關選擇權、加密貨幣交易以及現金管理（包括金融卡服務）的交易。該公司由 Vladimir Tenev 和 Baiju Prafulkumar Bhatt 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州門洛帕克。

info.description: Microsoft Corp. engages in the development and support of software, services, devices, and solutions. It operates through the following segments: Productivity and Business Processes, Intelligent Cloud, and More Personal Computing. The Productivity and Business Processes segment is composed of products and services relating to productivity, communication, and information services such as Office Commercial, Office Consumer, LinkedIn, and Dynamics business solutions. The Intelligent Cloud segment consists of public, private, and hybrid server products and cloud services for businesses and developers, as well as enterprise and partner services. The More Personal Computing segment refers to products and services including Windows operating system, Windows cloud services, Surface, HoloLens, personal computer accessories, Xbox hardware, Xbox Cloud Gaming, Microsoft News, and Microsoft Edge. The company was founded by Paul Gardner Allen and William Henry Gates, III in 1975 and is headquartered in Redmond, WA.
info.description_zh: Microsoft Corp. 從事軟體、服務、裝置和解決方案的開發和支援。它透過以下部門運作：生產力和業務流程、智慧雲端和更多個人運算。生產力和業務流程部門由與生產力、通訊和資訊服務相關的產品和服務組成，例如 Office Commercial、Office Consumer、LinkedIn 和 Dynamics 業務解決方案。智慧雲部分包括企業和開發人員的公有、私有和混合伺服器產品和雲端服務，以及企業和合作夥伴服務。更多個人運算部分是指包括 Windows 作業系統、Windows 雲端服務、Surface、HoloLens、個人電腦配件、Xbox 硬體、Xbox 雲端遊戲、Microsoft News 和 Microsoft Edge 在內的產品和服務。該公司由 Paul Gardner Allen 和 William Henry Gates, III 於 1975 年創立，總部位於華盛頓州雷德蒙。

info.description: Oracle Corp. engages in the provision of products and services that address aspects of corporate information technology environments, including applications and infrastructure technologies. It operates through the following business segments: Cloud and License, Hardware, and Services. The Cloud and License segment markets, sells, and delivers enterprise applications and infrastructure technologies through cloud and on-premise deployment models including cloud services and license support offerings. The Hardware segment provides infrastructure technologies including Oracle Engineered Systems, servers, storage, industry-specific hardware, operating systems, virtualization, management, and other hardware-related software. The Services segment offers consulting, advanced support, and education services. The company was founded by Lawrence Joseph Ellison, Robert Nimrod Miner, and Edward A. Oates on June 16, 1977 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Oracle Corp. 提供解決企業資訊科技環境各方面問題的產品和服務，包括應用程式和基礎架構技術。它透過以下業務部門運作：雲端和授權、硬體和服務。雲端和許可證部門透過雲端和本地部署模型（包括雲端服務和許可證支援產品）行銷、銷售和交付企業應用程式和基礎設施技術。硬體部門提供基礎設施技術，包括 Oracle 工程系統、伺服器、儲存、行業特定硬體、作業系統、虛擬化、管理和其他硬體相關軟體。服務部門提供諮詢、高階支援和教育服務。該公司由 Lawrence Joseph Ellison、Robert Nimrod Miner 和 Edward A. Oates 於 1977 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: KKR & Co., Inc. operates as an investment firm. It offers alternative asset management as well as capital markets and insurance solutions. The firm's business segments include Asset Management and Insurance Business. The Asset Management segment engages in providing private equity, real assets, credit and liquid strategies, capital markets, and principal activities. The Insurance Business segment offers retirement, life insurance and reinsurance solutions to clients across individual and institutional markets. The company was founded by Henry Kravis, George R. Roberts, and Jerome Kholberg on May 1, 1976 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: KKR & Co, Inc. 以投資公司營運。它提供另類資產管理以及資本市場和保險解決方案。該公司的業務部門包括資產管理和保險業務。資產管理部門提供私募股權、實體資產、信貸和流動性策略、資本市場和主要業務。保險業務部門為個人和機構市場的客戶提供退休、人壽保險和再保險解決方案。該公司由 Henry Kravis、George R. Roberts 和 Jerome Kholberg 於 1976 年 5 月 1 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. serves the scientific community through a broad offering of innovative products and services. Thermo Fisher Scientific serves customers working in pharmaceutical and biotech companies, hospitals and clinical diagnostic labs, universities, research institutions and government agencies, as well as environmental, industrial, research and development, quality and process control settings. The company's global team delivers an unrivaled combination of innovative technologies, purchasing convenience and pharmaceutical services through its brands, including Thermo Scientific, Applied Biosystems, Invitrogen, Fisher Scientific, Unity Lab Services, Patheon and PPD. The company continuously increases its depth of capabilities across its broad portfolio of innovative products and services and leverages its extensive global channels to address customers' needs. The company does this through organic investments in research and development, capacity and capabilities and through acquisitions. The company's goal is to enable its customers to be more productive in an increasingly competitive business environment, enable them to accelerate innovation, solve their challenges and advance their important work. The company's history roots back to the year 1956 when the business was first established. Thermo Fisher Scientific was formed in 2006 from the merger of Thermo Electron and Fisher Scientific and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. 透過提供廣泛的創新產品和服務為科學界提供服務。 Thermo Fisher Scientific 為製藥和生物技術公司、醫院和臨床診斷實驗室、大學、研究機構和政府機構以及環境、工業、研發、品質和製程控制機構的客戶提供服務。該公司的全球團隊透過其品牌（包括 Thermo Scientific、Applied Biosystems、Invitrogen、Fisher Scientific、Unity Lab Services、Patheon 和 PPD）提供無與倫比的創新技術、採購便利性和製藥服務組合。該公司不斷增強其廣泛的創新產品和服務組合的能力深度，並利用其廣泛的全球管道來滿足客戶的需求。該公司透過對研發、產能和能力的有機投資以及收購來實現這一目標。公司的目標是幫助客戶在競爭日益激烈的商業環境中提高生產力，加速創新，解決挑戰並推動重要工作。公司的歷史可以追溯到 1956 年公司成立之初。 Thermo Fisher Scientific 於 2006 年由 Thermo Electron 和 Fisher Scientific 合併而成，總部位於麻薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: Blackstone, Inc. engages in the provision of investment and fund management services. It operates through the following segments: Real Estate, Private Equity, Credit and Insurance, and Hedge Fund Solutions. The Real Estate segment includes management of opportunistic real estate funds, Core+ real estate funds, high-yield real estate debt funds, and liquid real estate debt funds. The Private Equity segment consists of management of flagship corporate private equity funds, sector and geographically focused corporate private equity funds, core private equity funds, an opportunistic investment platform, a secondary fund of funds business, infrastructure-focused funds, a life sciences investment platform, a growth equity investment platform, a multi-asset investment program for eligible high net worth investors and a capital markets services business. The Credit and Insurance segment refers to Blackstone Credit, which is organized into two overarching strategies: private credit which includes mezzanine direct lending funds, private placement strategies, stressed and distressed strategies and energy strategies, and liquid credit which consists of CLOs, closed-ended funds, open ended funds and separately managed accounts. In addition, the segment includes an insurer-focused platform, an asset-based finance platform, and publicly traded master limited partnership investment platform. The Hedge Fund Solutions segment focuses on Blackstone Alternative Asset Management, which manages a broad range of commingled and customized hedge fund of fund solutions. It also includes a GP Stakes business and investment platforms that invest directly, as well as investment platforms that seed new hedge fund businesses and create alternative solutions through daily liquidity products. The company was founded by Stephen Allen Schwarzman in 1985 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Blackstone, Inc. 從事提供投資和基金管理服務。它透過以下部門運作：房地產、私募股權、信貸和保險以及對沖基金解決方案。房地產部門包括機會型房地產基金、Core+房地產基金、高收益房地產債務基金和流動性房地產債務基金的管理。私募股權部門包括旗艦企業私募股權基金、專注於行業和地理的企業私募股權基金、核心私募股權基金、機會主義投資平台、二級母基金業務、基礎設施重點基金、生命科學投資平台、成長型股權投資平台、面向合格高淨值投資者的多資產投資計劃以及資本市場服務業務的管理。信貸和保險部​​門指的是 Blackstone Credit，它分為兩個總體策略：私人信貸（包括夾層直接貸款基金、私募策略、壓力和不良策略和能源策略）以及流動性信貸（包括 CLO、封閉式基金、開放式基金和單獨管理帳戶）。此外，該部門還包括以保險公司為中心的平台、基於資產的融資平台和公開交易的主有限合夥投資平台。對沖基金解決方案部門專注於 Blackstone 另類資產管理，該公司管理各種混合和客製化的對沖基金解決方案。它還包括直接投資的 GP Stakes 業務和投資平台，以及培育新對沖基金業務並透過日常流動性產品創建替代解決方案的投資平台。該公司由史蒂芬艾倫施瓦茨曼 (Stephen Allen Schwarzman) 於 1985 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Capital One Financial Corp. is a financial holding company, which engages in the provision of financial products and services. It operates through the following segments: Credit Card, Consumer Banking, and Commercial Banking. The Credit Card segment includes domestic consumer and small business card lending, and international card lending businesses. The Consumer Banking segment consists of branch-based lending and deposit gathering activities for consumers and small businesses. The Commercial Banking segment includes lending, deposit gathering and treasury management services to commercial real estate and commercial and industrial customers. The company was founded by Richard D. Fairbank on July 21, 1994 and is headquartered in McLean, VA.
info.description_zh: 第一資本金融公司是一家金融控股公司，從事提供金融產品和服務。它透過以下部門運作：信用卡部門、消費者銀行部門和商業銀行部門。信用卡部門包括國內消費者和小型企業卡貸款以及國際卡貸款業務。消費者銀行業務部門包括面向消費者和小型企業的分行貸款和存款收集活動。商業銀行部門包括向商業房地產以及商業和工業客戶提供貸款、存款和資金管理服務。該公司由 Richard D. Fairbank 於 1994 年 7 月 21 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州麥克萊恩。

info.description: Block, Inc. engages in creating ecosystems for distinct customer audiences. It operates through the Square and Cash App segments. The Square segment provides payment services, software solutions, hardware, and financial services to sellers. The Cash App segment includes the financial tools available to individuals within the mobile Cash App, including peer-to-peer payments, bitcoin and stock investments. It also includes Cash App Card, which is linked to customer stored balances that customers can use to pay for purchases or withdraw funds from an ATM. The company was founded by Jack Patrick Dorsey and James Morgan McKelvey in February 2009 and is headquartered in Oakland, CA.
info.description_zh: Block, Inc. 致力於為不同的客戶群創建生態系統。它透過 Square 和 Cash App 部門運作。 Square 部門為賣家提供支付服務、軟體解決方案、硬體和金融服務。現金應用程式部分包括行動現金應用程式中個人可用的金融工具，包括點對點支付、比特幣和股票投資。它還包括現金應用卡，該卡與客戶儲存的餘額相關聯，客戶可以用它來支付購買費用或從 ATM 提取資金。該公司由 Jack Patrick Dorsey 和 James Morgan McKelvey 於 2009 年 2 月創立，總部位於加州奧克蘭。

info.description: The Walt Disney Co. engages in the business of international family entertainment and media enterprise. It owns and operates television and radio production, distribution and broadcasting stations, direct-to-consumer services, amusement parks, and hotels. It operates through the following business segments: Disney Entertainment, ESPN, and Disney Parks, Experiences, and Products. The company was founded by Walter Elias Disney on October 16, 1923 and is headquartered in Burbank, CA.
info.description_zh: 華特迪士尼公司從事國際家庭娛樂和媒體業務。它擁有並經營電視和廣播製作、發行和廣播電台、直接面向消費者的服務、遊樂園和酒店。它透過以下業務部門運作：迪士尼娛樂、ESPN 以及迪士尼樂園、體驗和產品。該公司由沃爾特·埃利亞斯·迪士尼 (Walter Elias Disney) 於 1923 年 10 月 16 日創立，總部位於加利福尼亞州伯班克。

info.description: Raymond James Financial, Inc. is an investment holding company, which engages in the provision of financial and investment services. Its services include investment management, merger and acquisition and advisory, the underwriting, distribution, trading and brokerage of equity and debt securities, sale of mutual funds, corporate and retail banking, and trust services. It operates through the following segments: Private Client Group, Capital Markets, Asset Management, Bank, and Other. The Private Client Group segment provides financial planning, investment advisory, and securities transaction services to clients through financial advisors. The Capital Markets segment focuses on investment banking, institutional sales, securities trading, equity research and the syndication, and management of investments in low-income housing funds and funds of a similar nature. The Asset Management segment is involved in asset management, portfolio management, and related administrative services to retail and institutional clients. The Bank segment refers to the results of banking operations. The Other segment includes private equity investments, which predominantly consist of investments in third-party funds. The company was founded by Robert A. James in 1962 and is headquartered in St. Petersburg, FL.
info.description_zh: Raymond James Financial, Inc.是一家投資控股公司，從事提供金融和投資服務。其服務包括投資管理、併購和諮詢、股票和債務證券的承銷、分銷、交易和經紀、共同基金銷售、企業和零售銀行業務以及信託服務。它透過以下部門運作：私人客戶部門、資本市場、資產管理、銀行和其他部門。私人客戶集團部門透過財務顧問向客戶提供財務規劃、投資諮詢和證券交易服務。資本市場部門專注於投資銀行、機構銷售、證券交易、股票研究和銀團以及低收入住房基金和類似性質基金的投資管理。資產管理部門為零售和機構客戶提供資產管理、投資組合管理以及相關管理服務。銀行部門是指銀行業務的結果。其他部門包括私募股權投資，主要包括對第三方基金的投資。該公司由 Robert A. James 於 1962 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州聖彼得堡。

info.description: American Express Co. engages in the provision of card-issuing, merchant-acquiring, and card network businesses. Its products and services include credit cards, business credit cards, corporate programs, gift cards, savings accounts and CDs, and the American Express App. It operates through the following segments: the United States Consumer Services (USCS), Commercial Services (CS), International Card Services (ICS), Global Merchant and Network Services (GMNS), and Corporate and Other. The USCS segment includes proprietary consumer cards and provides services to United States consumers. The CS segment offers corporate and small business cards and provides services to United States businesses. The ICS segment provides consumers, small businesses, and corporate cards outside the United States. The GMNS segment is involved in operating a global payments network that processes and settles card transactions, acquires merchants, and provides multi-channel marketing programs and capabilities, services and data analytics. The Corporate and Other segment covers corporate functions and certain other businesses and operations. It also operates through the following geographical segments: United States, EMEA, APAC, LACC, and Other. The EMEA segment represents Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. The APAC segment refers to Asia Pacific, Australia, and New Zealand. The LACC segment focuses on Latin America, Canada, and the Caribbean. The Other segment includes net costs which are not directly allocated to specific geographic regions. The company was founded by Henry Wells, William G. Fargo, and John Warren Butterfield on March 28, 1850 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 美國運通公司從事發卡、商家收單和卡片網路業務。其產品和服務包括信用卡、商業信用卡、企業計劃、禮品卡、儲蓄帳戶和 CD 以及美國運通應用程式。該公司透過以下部門營運：美國消費者服務部門 (USCS)、商業服務部門 (CS)、國際卡服務部門 (ICS)、全球商家和網路服務部門 (GMNS) 以及企業及其他部門。 USCS 部門包括專有消費者卡並向美國消費者提供服務。 CS 部門提供公司和小型商務卡，並為美國企業提供服務。 ICS 部門為美國境外的消費者、小型企業和公司卡提供服務。 GMNS 部門參與經營全球支付網絡，該網絡處理和結算卡交易、收購商戶並提供多通路行銷計劃和功能、服務和數據分析。公司及其他部門涵蓋公司職能以及某些其他業務和營運。它也透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、歐洲、中東和非洲、亞太地區、拉丁美洲及加勒比地區和其他地區。 EMEA 部分代表歐洲、中東和非洲。亞太地區是指亞太地區、澳洲和紐西蘭。 LACC 部門專注於拉丁美洲、加拿大和加勒比地區。其他部門包括未直接分配給特定地理區域的淨成本。該公司由 Henry Wells、William G. Fargo 和 John Warren Butterfield 於 1850 年 3 月 28 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Everest Group Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of reinsurance and insurance services. It operates through the following segments: Reinsurance, and Insurance. The Reinsurance segment writes property and casualty reinsurance and specialty lines of business, including marine, aviation, surety, and accident and health business, on both a treaty and facultative basis, through reinsurance brokers, as well as directly with ceding companies primarily within the U.S. The Insurance segment writes property and casualty insurance directly and through brokers, surplus lines brokers, and general agents within the U.S., Canada, and Europe. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda.
info.description_zh: Everest Group Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事提供再保險和保險服務。它透過以下部門運作：再保險和保險。再保險部門透過再保險經紀人以及直接與主要位於美國境內的分保公司，在條約和臨時基礎上承保財產和傷亡再保險以及專業業務，包括海上、航空、擔保以及事故和健康業務。保險部門直接並透過美國、加拿大和歐洲境內的經紀人、盈餘保險經紀人和總代理承保財產和傷亡保險。該公司成立於1999年，總部位於百慕達漢密爾頓。

info.description: Amphenol Corp. engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of electrical, electronic and fiber optic connectors, interconnect systems, antennas, sensors and sensor-based products, and specialty cable. It operates through the following segments: Harsh Environment Solutions, Communications Solutions, and Interconnect and Sensor Systems. The Harsh Environment Solutions segment manufactures and markets a broad range of ruggedized interconnect products, including connectors and interconnect systems, printed circuits and printed circuit assemblies, and other products. The Communications Solutions segment focuses on the design, manufacture, and marketing of connector and interconnect systems, including radio frequency, power, fiber optic, and other products, together with antennas. The Interconnect and Sensor Systems segment is involved in the design, manufacture, and marketing of sensors, sensor-based systems, connectors, and value-add interconnect systems. The company was founded by Schmitt J. Arthur in 1932 and is headquartered in Wallingford, CT.
info.description_zh: 安費諾公司從事電氣、電子和光纖連接器、互連繫統、天線、感測器和基於感測器的產品以及特殊電纜的設計、製造和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：惡劣環境解決方案、通訊解決方案以及互連和感測器系統。惡劣環境解決方案部門製造和銷售各種堅固耐用的互連產品，包括連接器和互連繫統、印刷電路和印刷電路組件以及其他產品。通訊解決方案部門專注於連接器和互連系統的設計、製造和行銷，包括射頻、電源、光纖和其他產品以及天線。互連和感測器系統部門從事感測器、基於感測器的系統、連接器和增值互連系統的設計、製造和行銷。該公司由 Schmitt J. Arthur 於 1932 年創立，總部位於康乃狄克州沃靈福德。

info.description: Prologis, Inc. engages in providing logistics solutions and services. It operates in the Real Estate and Strategic Capital segments. The Real Estate segment represents the ownership and development of operating properties and is the largest component of revenue and earnings. The Strategic Capital segment refers to the management of co-investment ventures and other unconsolidated entities. The company was founded by Hamid R. Moghadam in 1991 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 工業
info.description_zh: Prologis, Inc. 致力於提供物流解決方案和服務。它的業務涉及房地產和戰略資本領域。房地產部門代表營運物業的所有權和開發，是收入和收益的最大組成部分。策略資本部門是指聯合投資企業和其他未合併實體的管理。該公司由 Hamid R. Moghadam 於 1991 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. engages in the business of developing and operating restaurants that serve a relevant menu of burritos, burrito bowls, quesadillas, tacos, and salads made using fresh, high-quality ingredients. The company was founded by Steve Ells in 1993 and is headquartered in Newport Beach, CA.
info.description_zh: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. 從事開發和經營餐廳業務，這些餐廳提供墨西哥捲餅、墨西哥捲餅碗、墨西哥玉米餅、炸玉米餅和沙拉等相關菜單，均採用新鮮優質原料製成。該公司由 Steve Ells 於 1993 年創立，總部位於加州紐波特海灘。

info.description: Carnival Corp. engages in the operation of cruise ships. It operates through the following business segments: North America Cruise Operations, Europe Cruise Operations, Cruise Support, and Tour and Others. The North America Cruise Operations segment includes the Carnival Cruise Line, Holland America Line, Princess Cruises, and Seabourn. Europe Cruise Operations segment consists of AIDA, Costa, Cunard, and P&O Cruises (UK). The Cruise Support segment represents port destinations and private islands for the benefit of its cruise brands. The Tour and Other segment operates hotel and transportation operations of Holland America Princess Alaska Tours. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: 嘉年華公司從事遊輪營運。該公司透過以下業務部門營運：北美郵輪營運部門、歐洲郵輪營運部門、郵輪支援部門以及旅遊及其他部門。北美郵輪營運部門包括嘉年華郵輪公司、荷美郵輪公司、公主郵輪公司和世邦郵輪公司。歐洲郵輪營運部門包括 AIDA、Costa、Cunard 和 P&O Cruises（英國）。郵輪支援部門代表港口目的地和私人島嶼，以維護其郵輪品牌的利益。旅遊及其他部門經營荷美阿拉斯加公主旅行社的飯店和運輸業務。該公司成立於 1972 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: United Parcel Service, Inc. is a package delivery company, which engages in the provision of global supply chain management solutions. It operates through the following segments: U.S. Domestic Package, International Package, and Supply Chain Solutions. The U.S. Domestic Package segment includes time-definite delivery of letters, documents, and packages. The International Package segment focuses on delivery and shipments in Europe, Asia, the Indian sub-continent, the Middle East, Africa, Canada, and Latin America. The Supply Chain Solutions is involved in forwarding, logistics, Coyote, Marken, and UPS Mail Innovations. The company was founded by James E. Casey and Claude Ryan on August 28, 1907 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: United Parcel Service, Inc.是一家包裹遞送公司，提供全球供應鏈管理解決方案。該公司透過以下部門營運：美國國內包裹部門、國際包裹部門和供應鏈解決方案部門。美國國內包裹部分包括限時遞送信件、文件和包裹。國際包裹部門專注於歐洲、亞洲、印度次大陸、中東、非洲、加拿大和拉丁美洲的交付和運輸。供應鏈解決方案涉及貨運、物流、Coyote、Marken 和 UPS Mail Innovations。該公司由 James E. Casey 和 Claude Ryan 於 1907 年 8 月 28 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Apple, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of smartphones, personal computers, tablets, wearables and accessories, and other varieties of related services. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, Europe, Greater China, Japan, and Rest of Asia Pacific. The Americas segment includes North and South America. The Europe segment consists of European countries, as well as India, the Middle East, and Africa. The Greater China segment comprises China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. The Rest of Asia Pacific segment includes Australia and Asian countries. Its products and services include iPhone, Mac, iPad, AirPods, Apple TV, Apple Watch, Beats products, AppleCare, iCloud, digital content stores, streaming, and licensing services. The company was founded by Steven Paul Jobs, Ronald Gerald Wayne, and Stephen G. Wozniak in April 1976 and is headquartered in Cupertino, CA.
info.description_zh: 蘋果從事智慧型手機、個人電腦、平板電腦、穿戴式裝置和配件的設計、製造和銷售以及其他各種相關服務。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、歐洲、大中華區、日本和亞太地區其他地區。美洲部分包括北美和南美。歐洲部分包括歐洲國家以及印度、中東和非洲。大中華區業務包括中國大陸、香港和台灣。亞太其他地區包括澳洲和亞洲國家。其產品和服務包括 iPhone、Mac、iPad、AirPods、Apple TV、Apple Watch、Beats 產品、AppleCare、iCloud、數位內容商店、串流媒體和授權服務。該公司由 Steven Paul Jobs、Ronald Gerald Wayne 和 Stephen G. Wozniak 於 1976 年 4 月創立，總部位於加州庫比蒂諾。

info.description: AppLovin Corp. engages in the development and operation of a mobile marketing platform. It offers AppDiscovery, MAX, Adjust, and SparkLabs. Its software-based platform caters to mobile application developers to improve the marketing and monetization of applications. The company was founded by Andrew Karam, John Krystynak, and Adam Foroughi in 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: AppLovin Corp.從事行動行銷平台的開發與營運。它提供 AppDiscovery、MAX、Adjust 和 SparkLabs。其基於軟體的平台迎合行動應用程式開發人員的需求，以改善應用程式的行銷和貨幣化。該公司由 Andrew Karam、John Krystynak 和 Adam Foroughi 於 2011 年創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Booking Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of online travel and related solutions. The firm offers services through the following brands: Booking.com, Priceline, Agoda, KAYAK, and OpenTable. It provides accommodation reservations including hotels, hostels, apartments, vacation rentals, and other properties. The company was founded by Jay Scott Walker on July 18, 1997, and is headquartered in Norwalk, CT.
info.description_zh: Booking Holdings, Inc. 從事提供線上旅遊及相關解決方案。該公司透過以下品牌提供服務：Booking.com、Priceline、Agoda、KAYAK 和 OpenTable。它提供住宿預訂，包括酒店、旅館、公寓、度假出租屋和其他房產。該公司由 Jay Scott Walker 於 1997 年 7 月 18 日創立，總部位於康乃狄克州諾沃克。

info.description: DoorDash, Inc. engages in the design, development, and operation of a food delivery and logistics platform. It serves consumers in the United States, Canada, and Australia. The company was founded by Andy Fang, Tony Xu, Stanley Tang, and Evan Moore on January 12, 2013 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: DoorDash, Inc. 從事食品配送和物流平台的設計、開發和營運。它為美國、加拿大和澳洲的消費者提供服務。該公司由 Andy Fang、Tony Xu、Stanley Tang 和 Evan Moore 於 2013 年 1 月 12 日創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Synopsys, Inc. engages in the provision of electronic design automation (EDA) software that engineers use to design and test integrated circuits (ICs). It also offers semiconductor intellectual property (IP) products. It operates through the Design Automation and Design IP segments. The Design Automation segment includes silicon design, verification of products and services, and Ansys products, and system integration of products and services. The Design IP segment refers to interface, foundation, security, and embedded processor IP, IP subsystems, and IP implementation services that serve companies primarily in the semiconductor and electronics industries. The company was founded by Aart J. de Geus, Bill Krieger, Dave Gregory, and Rick Rudell in December 1986 and is headquartered in Sunnyvale, CA.
info.description_zh: Synopsys, Inc. 致力於提供工程師用來設計和測試積體電路 (IC) 的電子設計自動化 (EDA) 軟體。它還提供半導體知識產權（IP）產品。它透過設計自動化和設計 IP 部門運作。設計自動化部門包括晶片設計、產品和服務驗證、Ansys 產品以及產品和服務的系統整合。設計IP部分涉及介面、基礎、安全和嵌入式處理器IP、IP子系統和IP實施服務，主要為半導體和電子行業的公司提供服務。該公司由 Aart J. de Geus、Bill Krieger、Dave Gregory 和 Rick Rudell 於 1986 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州桑尼維爾。

info.description: Tesla, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of electric vehicles and energy generation and storage systems. It operates through the Automotive and Energy Generation and Storage segments. The Automotive segment includes the design, development, manufacture, sale, and lease of electric vehicles as well as sales of automotive regulatory credits. The Energy Generation and Storage segment is involved in the design, manufacture, installation, sale, and lease of solar energy generation, energy storage products, and related services and sales of solar energy systems incentives. The company was founded by Jeffrey B. Straubel, Elon Reeve Musk, Martin Eberhard, and Marc Tarpenning on July 1, 2003 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: Tesla, Inc. 從事電動車以及能源產生和儲存系統的設計、開發、製造和銷售。它透過汽車、能源生產和儲存部門運作。汽車部門包括電動車的設計、開發、製造、銷售和租賃以及汽車監管積分的銷售。能源發電和儲存部門從事太陽能發電、儲能產品的設計、製造、安裝、銷售和租賃，以及太陽能係統激勵措施的相關服務和銷售。該公司由 Jeffrey B. Straubel、Elon Reeve Musk、Martin Eberhard 和 Marc Tarpenning 於 2003 年 7 月 1 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in providing financial planning, asset management, and insurance services to individuals, businesses, and institutions. It operates through the following business segments: Advice & Wealth Management, Asset Management, Retirement & Protection Solutions, and Corporate & Other. The Advice & Wealth Management segment consists of financial planning and advice, as well as full-service brokerage services for retail clients through financial advisors. The Asset Management segment offers investment management, advice, and products to retail, high net worth, and institutional clients through Columbia Threadneedle. The Retirement & Protection Solutions segment refers to RiverSource solutions, which includes clients annuities, life insurance, and disability income insurance products. The Corporate & Other segment handles closed blocks of business and net investment income or loss on corporate level assets, including excess capital held in subsidiaries. The company was founded by John Tappan in 1894 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.description_zh: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. 是一家控股公司，致力於為個人、企業和機構提供財務規劃、資產管理和保險服務。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：諮詢與財富管理、資產管理、退休與保障解決方案以及企業與其他。建議和財富管理部門包括財務規劃和建議，以及透過財務顧問為零售客戶提供全方位經紀服務。資產管理部門透過 Columbia Threadneedle 向零售、高淨值和機構客戶提供投資管理、建議和產品。退休和保障解決方案部門是指 RiverSource 解決方案，其中包括客戶年金、人壽保險和殘障收入保險產品。本公司及其他部門處理封閉的業務區塊以及公司級資產的淨投資收入或損失，包括子公司持有的超額資本。該公司由 John Tappan 於 1894 年創立，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: Ares Management Corp. engages in the provision of investment and consultancy services. It operates through the following segments: Credit Group, Private Equity Group, Real Assets Group, Secondaries Group, and Other. The Credit Group segment includes the management of strategies across the liquid and illiquid spectrum, direct lending, and Asia-Pacific. The Private Equity Group segment involves the categorization of investment strategies as corporate, special opportunities, and Asia-Pacific. The Real Assets Group segment focuses on equity and debt strategies across infrastructure investments. The Secondaries Group segment consists of investment in secondary markets, alternative asset class strategies, private equity, real estate, infrastructure, and credit. The company was founded by Michael J. Arougheti, David B. Kaplan, John H. Kissick, Antony P. Ressler, and Bennett Rosenthal in 1997 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: Ares Management Corp. 從事提供投資和諮詢服務。它透過以下部門運作：信貸部門、私募股權部門、實物資產部門、二級部門和其他部門。信貸集團部門包括流動性和非流動性、直接貸款和亞太地區的策略管理。私募股權集團部門將投資策略分類為企業、特殊機會和亞太地區。實體資產集團部門專注於基礎設施投資的股權和債務策略。二級市場部門包括二級市場投資、另類資產類別策略、私募股權、房地產、基礎設施和信貸。該公司由 Michael J. Arougheti、David B. Kaplan、John H. Kissick、Antony P. Ressler 和 Bennett Rosenthal 於 1997 年創立，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. engages in the provision of trading and investment solutions to investors. It operates through the following business segments: Options, North American Equities, Futures, Europe and Asia Pacific, Global FX, and Digital. The Options segment includes the options exchange business, which lists trading options on market indexes and on non-exclusive multiply listed options. The North American Equities segment covers listed cash equities and ETP transaction services that occur on BZX, BYX, EDGX, and EDGA. The Futures segment refers to the business of futures exchange, CFE, which includes offering for trading futures on the VIX Index and bitcoin and other futures products. The Europe and Asia Pacific segment relates to the pan-European listed cash equities transaction services, ETPs, exchange-traded commodities, and international depository receipts that occur on the RIE, operated by Cboe Europe Equities. The Global FX segment represents the institutional FX trading services that occur on the Cboe FX platform. The Digital segment focuses on Cboe Digital, which operates a digital asset spot market and a regulated futures exchange. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. 致力於為投資者提供交易和投資解決方案。該公司透過以下業務部門運作：選擇權、北美股票、期貨、歐洲和亞太地區、全球外匯和數位。選擇權部門包括選擇權交易業務，該業務列出市場指數和非獨家多重上市選擇權的交易選擇權。北美股票部門涵蓋 BZX、BYX、EDGX 和 EDGA 上發生的上市現金股票和 ETP 交易服務。期貨業務是指期貨交易所（CFE）的業務，包括提供 VIX 指數和比特幣及其他期貨產品的期貨交易。歐洲和亞太分部涉及泛歐上市現金股票交易服務、ETP、交易所交易商品以及 RIE 上發生的國際存託憑證，由 Cboe Europe Equities 營運。全球外匯部分代表芝加哥期權交易所外匯平台上發生的機構外匯交易服務。數位部門專注於 Cboe Digital，該公司經營數位資產現貨市場和受監管的期貨交易所。該公司成立於 1973 年，總部位於伊利諾伊州芝加哥。

info.description: Corpay, Inc. engages in the provision of digital payment solutions that enable businesses to control purchases and make payments. It operates through the following segments: Vehicle Payments, Corporate Payments, Lodging Payments and Other. The Vehicle Payments segment helps, controls and monitors spending and includes fuel card offerings, tolls and other complementary products. The Corporate Payments segment simplifies and automates vendor payments and includes accounts payable (AP) automation, virtual cards, cross-border payments and purchasing and travel and entertainment (T&E) card products. The Lodging Payments segment helps businesses manage lodging costs, while simplifying the management of hotels and housing, both short and longer-term, while also providing traveler and end customer support. The Other segment includes gift solutions and payroll card solution. It also operates through the following geographical segments: U.S., Brazil and the United Kingdom. The company was founded by William Boatner Reily III and Ronald F. Clarke in 1985 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Corpay, Inc. 致力於提供數位支付解決方案，使企業能夠控制購買和付款。它透過以下部門運作：車輛付款、公司付款、住宿付款和其他。車輛支付部門幫助、控制和監控支出，包括加油卡產品、通行費和其他補充產品。企業支付部門簡化和自動化供應商付款，包括應付帳款 (AP) 自動化、虛擬卡、跨境支付以及採購、旅行和娛樂 (T&E) 卡產品。住宿支付部門幫助企業管理住宿成本，同時簡化短期和長期飯店和住房的管理，同時也為旅客和最終客戶提供支援。其他部分包括禮品解決方案和工資卡解決方案。它還透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、巴西和英國。該公司由 William Boatner Reily III 和 Ronald F. Clarke 於 1985 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Ford Motor Co. engages in the manufacture, distribution, and sale of automobiles. It operates through the following segments: Ford Blue, Ford Model E, Ford Pro, Ford Credit, and Corporate Other. The Ford Blue, Ford Model E, and Ford Pro segment includes the sale of Ford and Lincoln vehicles, service parts, and accessories, together with the associated costs to develop, manufacture, distribute, and service the vehicles, parts, and accessories. The Ford Credit segment consists of the Ford Credit business on a consolidated basis, which is primarily vehicle-related financing and leasing activities. The Corporate Other segment refers to corporate governance expenses, past service pension and OPEB income and expense, interest income and gains and losses from cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities, and foreign exchange derivatives gains, and losses associated with intercompany lending. The company was founded by Henry Ford on June 16, 1903 and is headquartered in Dearborn, MI.
info.description_zh: 福特汽車公司從事汽車的製造、分銷和銷售。該公司透過以下部門營運：Ford Blue、Ford Model E、Ford Pro、Ford Credit 和 Corporate Other。福特 Blue、福特 Model E 和福特 Pro 部門包括福特和林肯車輛、維修零件和配件的銷售，以及開發、製造、分銷和維修車輛、零件和配件的相關成本。福特信貸部門由合併後的福特信貸業務組成，主要從事與車輛相關的融資和租賃活動。公司其他部分是指公司治理費用、過去的服務退休金和 OPEB 收入和費用、利息收入以及現金、現金等價物和有價證券的損益，以及外匯衍生性商品收益以及與公司間借貸相關的損失。該公司由亨利福特於 1903 年 6 月 16 日創立，總部位於密西根州迪爾伯恩。

info.description: Fiserv, Inc. engages in the provision of financial services technology. It operates through the Merchant and Financial segments. The Merchant segment offers commerce-enabling products and services including merchant acquiring and digital commerce and mobile payment services, and security and fraud protection, stored-value, and pay-by-bank solutions to companies of all sizes. The Financial segment provides products and services such as processing of customer loan and deposit accounts, digital payments, and card transactions to financial institutions and corporate and public sector clients. The company was founded by Leslie M. Muma and George D. Dalton on July 31, 1984 and is headquartered in Milwaukee, WI.
info.description_zh: Fiserv, Inc. 從事提供金融服務技術。它透過商業和金融部門運作。商家部門為各種規模的公司提供商業支援產品和服務，包括商家收單、數位商務和行動支付服務，以及安全和詐欺保護、儲值和銀行支付解決方案。金融部門向金融機構以及企業和公共部門客戶提供客戶貸款和存款帳戶處理、數位支付和卡片交易等產品和服務。該公司由 Leslie M. Muma 和 George D. Dalton 於 1984 年 7 月 31 日創立，總部位於威斯康辛州密爾瓦基。

info.description: Pool Corp. engages in the wholesale distribution of swimming pool supplies, equipment, and related leisure products. It also offers non-discretionary pool maintenance products such as chemicals and replacement parts, discretionary products like packaged pool kits, whole goods, irrigation, and landscape products, including a complete line of commercial and residential irrigation products and parts, power equipment for the professional landscape market, specialty products such as outdoor lighting, grills, and outdoor kitchen components, and golf irrigation and water management products. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Covington, LA.
info.description_zh: Pool Corp. 從事游泳池用品、設備和相關休閒產品的批發分銷。它還提供非全權泳池維護產品，如化學品和替換零件，全權產品，如包裝泳池套件、整體商品、灌溉和景觀產品，包括全系列商業和住宅灌溉產品和零件，專業景觀市場的電力設備，戶外照明、烤架和戶外廚房組件等特色產品，以及高爾夫灌溉和水管理產品。該公司成立於 1993 年，總部位於路易斯安那州卡溫頓。

info.description: The Charles Schwab Corp. is a savings and loan holding company, which engages in the provision of wealth management, securities brokerage, banking, asset management, custody, and financial advisory services. It operates through the Investor Services and Advisor Services segments. The Investor Services segment includes retail brokerage, investment advisory, and banking and trust services to individual investors, retirement plan and business services, as well as other corporate brokerage services, to businesses and employees. The Advisor Services segment provides custodial, trading, banking and trust, and support services to independent registered investment advisors, independent retirement advisors, and recordkeepers. The company was founded by Charles Robert Schwab in 1986 and is headquartered in Westlake, TX.
info.description_zh: 嘉信理財公司是一家儲蓄和貸款控股公司，從事提供財富管理、證券經紀、銀行、資產管理、託管和財務諮詢服務。它透過投資者服務和顧問服務部門運作。投資者服務部門包括為個人投資者提供零售經紀、投資諮詢、銀行和信託服務、退休計畫和商業服務，以及為企業和員工提供的其他企業經紀服務。顧問服務部門為獨立註冊投資顧問、獨立退休顧問和記錄保管員提供託管、交易、銀行和信託以及支援服務。該公司由 Charles Robert Schwab 於 1986 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州西湖。

info.description: Uber Technologies, Inc. is a technology platform, which engages in the development and operation of technology applications, networks, and product to power movement from point A to point B. The firm offers ride services and merchants delivery service providers for meal preparation, grocery, and other delivery services. It operates through the following segments: Mobility, Delivery, and Freight. The Mobility segment refers to products that connect consumers with mobility drivers who provide rides in a variety of vehicles, such as cars, auto rickshaws, motorbikes, minibuses, and taxis. The Delivery segment offers consumers the chance to search for and discover local restaurants, order a meal, and either pick-up at the restaurant or have the meal delivered. The Freight segment focuses on connecting carriers with shippers on its platform, and gives carriers upfront, transparent pricing, and the ability to book a shipment. The company was founded by Oscar Salazar Gaitan, Travis Kalanick, and Garrett Camp in 2009 and is headquartered in San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Uber Technologies, Inc.是一家技術平台，從事技術應用程式、網路和產品的開發和運營，以推動從A點到B點的移動。該公司提供乘車服務和商家送貨服務提供商，提供膳食準備、雜貨和其他送貨服務。它透過以下部門運作：移動、交付和貨運。移動出行領域是指將消費者與移動司機聯繫起來的產品，這些司機提供各種車輛的乘車服務，例如汽車、人力車、摩托車、小巴和計程車。外賣部分為消費者提供了搜尋和發現當地餐廳、訂餐以及在餐廳取餐或送貨上門的機會。貨運部門專注於在其平台上連接承運商與托運人，並為承運商提供預付款、透明的定價以及預訂貨運的能力。該公司由 Oscar Salazar Gaitan、Travis Kalanick 和 Garrett Camp 於 2009 年創立，總部位於加州舊金山。

info.description: Veralto Corp. engages in the provision of environmental and applied solutions. Its segments include Water Quality and Product Quality & Innovation. The Water Quality segment provides comprehensive portfolios of water analytics and differentiated water treatment solutions that enable the reliable delivery of safe drinking water by public and private utilities. The Product Quality & Innovation segment provides a broad set of solutions for brand owners and consumer packaged goods companies that enable speed to market as well as traceability and quality control of their products. The company was founded on October 26, 2022 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Veralto Corp. 從事提供環境和應用解決方案。其部門包括水質和產品品質與創新。水質部門提供全面的水分析和差異化水處理解決方案組合，使公共和私人公用事業能夠可靠地提供安全飲用水。產品品質和創新部門為品牌所有者和消費品公司提供廣泛的解決方案，以加快產品上市速度以及產品的可追溯性和品質控制。該公司成立於 2022 年 10 月 26 日，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: Extra Space Storage, Inc. is a real estate investment trust. It operates through the following segments: Self-Storage Operations and Tenant Reinsurance. The Self-Storage Operations segment includes rental operations of wholly-owned stores. The Tenant Reinsurance segment includes reinsurance of risks relating to the loss of goods stored by tenants in stores. The company was founded by Kenneth Musser Woolley on April 30, 2004 and is headquartered in Salt Lake City, UT.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 工業
info.description_zh: Extra Space Storage, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司。它透過以下部門運作：自助倉儲營運和租戶再保險。自助倉儲營運部門包括全資商店的租賃業務。租戶再保險部門包括與租戶存放在商店的貨物損失相關的風險的再保險。該公司由 Kenneth Musser Woolley 於 2004 年 4 月 30 日創立，總部位於猶他州鹽湖城。

info.description: Kimco Realty Corp. is a real estate investment trust company, which engages in the ownership and operation of open-air and grocery-anchored shopping centers. It also specializes in shopping center acquisitions, development and management. The company was founded by Milton Cooper and Martin S. Kimmel in 1973 and is headquartered in Jericho, NY.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 零售
info.description_zh: Kimco Realty Corp. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事露天購物中心和雜貨店購物中心的所有權和營運。它還專門從事購物中心收購、開發和管理。該公司由 Milton Cooper 和 Martin S. Kimmel 於 1973 年創立，總部位於紐約州傑里科。

info.description: BlackRock, Inc. engages in the provision of investment, advisory, and risk management solutions. Its products include single-asset and multi-asset portfolios. The company was founded by Laurence Douglas Fink and Robert Steven Kapito in 1988 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: BlackRock, Inc. 從事提供投資、諮詢和風險管理解決方案。其產品包括單一資產和多元資產組合。該公司由 Laurence Douglas Fink 和 Robert Steven Kapito 於 1988 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Norfolk Southern Corp. is a transportation company, which engages in the rail transportation of raw materials, intermediate products, and finished goods. The company also transports overseas freight through several Atlantic and Gulf Coast ports. Its services include property leases and sales, wire line or pipeline and fiber optics projects, access property, managing private crossings, promoting businesses with signboards, and natural resource management. The company was founded on July 23, 1980, and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: 諾福克南方公司是一家運輸公司，從事原料、中間產品和製成品的鐵路運輸。該公司還透過幾個大西洋和墨西哥灣沿岸港口運輸海外貨物。其服務包括房產租賃和銷售、有線或管道以及光纖項目、接入房產、管理私人過境點、利用招牌促進業務以及​​自然資源管理。該公司成立於1980年7月23日，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: TransDigm Group, Inc. engages in the design, production, and supply of aircraft components. It operates through the following segments: Power and Control, Airframe, and Non-Aviation. The Power and Control segment includes electromechanical actuators and controls, ignition systems and engine technology, specialized pumps and valves, and power conditioning devices. The Airframe segment covers engineered latching and locking devices, engineered rods, engineered connectors, and elastomer sealing solutions. The Non-Aviation segment involves off-road vehicle suppliers and subsystem suppliers, child restraint system suppliers, and satellite and space system suppliers. The company was founded by W. Nicholas Howley and Douglas W. Peacock in 1993 and is headquartered in Cleveland, OH.
info.description_zh: TransDigm Group, Inc. 從事飛機零件的設計、生產和供應。它透過以下部門運作：動力和控制、機身和非航空部門。電力和控制部門包括機電執行器和控制裝置、點火系統和引擎技術、專用泵浦和閥門以及電力調節裝置。機身部分涵蓋工程閂鎖和鎖定裝置、工程桿、工程連接器和彈性體密封解決方案。非航空部門涉及越野車輛供應商和子系統供應商、兒童約束系統供應商以及衛星和太空系統供應商。該公司由 W. Nicholas Howley 和 Douglas W. Peacock 於 1993 年創立，總部位於俄亥俄州克利夫蘭。

info.description: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the business of developing and commercializing novel therapeutics based on ribonucleic acid interference. The company was founded by Noble Laureate, David Bartel, Thomas Tuschl, Phillip Zamore, Paul R. Schimmel, and Phillip Allen Sharp on June 14, 2002, and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc.是一家生物製藥公司，從事基於核糖核酸幹擾的新型療法的開發和商業化業務。該公司由諾貝爾獎得主 David Bartel、Thomas Tuschl、Phillip Zamore、Paul R. Schimmel 和 Phillip Allen Sharp 於 2002 年 6 月 14 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: Linde Plc is a global industrial gases and engineering company. It designs and builds equipment that produces industrial gases. The company also offers gas production and processing services such as olefin plants, natural gas plants, air separation plants, hydrogen and synthesis gas plants and other types of plants. Its primary products are atmospheric gases and process gases. The company operates through the following reportable segments: Americas, EMEA APAC and Engineering. The Americas segment operates production facilities primarily in the United Sates, Canada, Mexico and Brazil. The EMEA segment has production facilities primarily in Germany, France, Sweden, the Republic of South Africa, and the United Kingdom. The APAC segment has production facilities located primarily in China, Australia, India, South Korea and Thailand. The Engineering segment designs and constructs turnkey process plants for third-party customers as well as for the gases businesses in many locations worldwide. Linde was founded by Carl Paul Gottfried von Lind in 1879 and is headquartered in Woking, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: 林德公司是一家全球工業氣體和工程公司。它設計和製造生產工業氣體的設備。該公司還提供氣體生產和加工服務，例如烯烴工廠、天然氣工廠、空氣分離工廠、氫氣和合成氣工廠以及其他類型的工廠。其主要產品為大氣氣體和製程氣體。該公司透過以下可報告部門運作：美洲、歐洲、中東和非洲、亞太地區和工程部門。美洲部門主要在美國、加拿大、墨西哥和巴西營運生產設施。歐洲、中東和非洲部門的生產設施主要位於德國、法國、瑞典、南非共和國和英國。亞太地區的生產設施主要位於中國、澳洲、印度、韓國和泰國。工程部門為第三方客戶以及全球許多地區的氣體業務設計和建造交鑰匙製程工廠。林德公司由 Carl Paul Gottfried von Lind 於 1879 年創立，總部位於英國沃金。

info.description: Albemarle Corp. engages in the development, manufacture, and marketing of chemicals for consumer electronics, petroleum refining, utilities, packaging, construction, transportation, pharmaceuticals, crop production, food-safety, and custom chemistry services. It operates through the following segments: Energy Storage, Specialties, and Ketjen. The Energy Storage segment develops and manufactures a broad range of basic lithium compounds, including lithium carbonate, lithium hydroxide, and lithium chloride. The Specialties segment focuses on optimizing a portfolio of bromine and specialized lithium solutions. The Ketjen segment consists of clean fuels technologies, fluidized catalytic cracking catalysts and additives, and performance catalyst solutions, which is primarily composed of organometallics and curatives. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Charlotte, NC.
info.description_zh: Albemarle Corp. 從事消費性電子、石油精煉、公用事業、包裝、建築、運輸、製藥、農作物生產、食品安全和客製化化學服務的化學品的開發、製造和行銷。它透過以下部門運作：能源儲存部門、專業部門和科琴部門。儲能部門開發和製造各種基本鋰化合物，包括碳酸鋰、氫氧化鋰和氯化鋰。特種產品部門專注於優化溴和特種鋰解決方案的產品組合。 Ketjen 部門包括清潔燃料技術、流化催化裂解催化劑和添加劑以及主要由有機金屬和固化劑組成的高性能催化劑解決方案。該公司成立於 1993 年，總部位於北卡羅來納州夏洛特。

info.description: IDEX Corp. engages in the provision of engineering solutions. It operates through the following segments: Fluid and Metering Technologies, Health and Science Technologies, and Fire and Safety or Diversified Products. The Fluid and Metering Technologies segment is involved in the design, production, and distribution of displacement pumps, valves, flow meters, injectors, and fluid-handling pump modules and systems. The Health and Science Technologies segment includes design, production, and distribution of precision fluidics, rotary lobe pumps, centrifugal and positive displacement pumps, roll compaction, and drying systems used in beverage, food processing, pharmaceutical, and cosmetics, pneumatic components, and sealing solutions. The Fire and Safety or Diversified Products segment consists of the production of firefighting pumps and controls, apparatus valves, monitors, nozzles, rescue tools, and lifting bags for the fire and rescue industry. The company was founded on September 24, 1987, and is headquartered in Northbrook, IL.
info.description_zh: IDEX Corp. 從事提供工程解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：流體和計量技術、健康和科學技術以及消防和安全或多元化產品。流體和計量技術部門從事活塞泵、閥門、流量計、注射器以及流體處理泵模組和系統的設計、生產和分銷。健康和科學技術部門包括設計、生產和分銷用於飲料、食品加工、製藥和化妝品、氣動元件和密封解決方案的精密流體、旋轉凸輪泵、離心泵和正排量泵、輥壓和乾燥系統。消防和安全或多元化產品部門包括生產用於消防和救援行業的消防泵浦和控制器、設備閥門、監視器、噴嘴、救援工具和起重氣袋。該公司成立於 1987 年 9 月 24 日，總部位於伊利諾伊州諾斯布魯克。

info.description: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. operates as an entertainment company. The firm engages in producing, marketing, and selling live concerts for artists via its global concert pipe. It operates through the following segments: Concerts, Sponsorship and Advertising, and Ticketing. The Concerts segment is involved in the promotion of live music events in owned or operated venues and in rented third-party venues. The Sponsorship and Advertising segment manages the development of strategic sponsorship programs in addition to the sale of international, national, and local sponsorships and placement of advertising such as signage, promotional programs, rich media offerings, including advertising associated with live streaming and music-related content, and ads across its distribution network of venues, events, and websites. The Ticketing segment is involved in the management of the global ticketing operations, including providing ticketing software and services to clients, and consumers with a marketplace, both online and mobile, for tickets and event information. The Ticketing segment is an agency business that sells tickets for events on behalf of its clients and retains a portion of the service charge as its fee. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Beverly Hills, CA.
info.description_zh: Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. 以娛樂公司經營。該公司透過其全球音樂會管道為藝術家製作、行銷和銷售現場音樂會。它透過以下部門運作：音樂會、贊助和廣告以及票務部門。音樂會部門參與在自有或經營的場地以及租賃的第三方場地推廣現場音樂活動。贊助和廣告部門除了銷售國際、國內和當地贊助以及廣告投放（例如標牌、促銷計劃、富媒體產品，包括與直播和音樂相關內容相關的廣告，以及在其場館、活動和網站的分銷網絡中的廣告）之外，還管理戰略贊助計劃的開發。票務部門參與全球票務業務的管理，包括向客戶和消費者提供票務軟體和服務，並透過線上和行動市場獲取票務和活動資訊。票務部門是一家代理業務，代表客戶銷售活動門票，並保留部分服務費作為費用。該公司成立於 1996 年，總部位於加利福尼亞州比佛利山莊。

info.description: Franklin Resources, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of investment management and related services. The firm offers services and products under various distinct brand names, including, but not limited to, Franklin, Templeton, Legg Mason, Benefit Street Partners, Brandywine Global Investment Management, Clarion Partners, ClearBridge Investments, Fiduciary Trust Company International, Franklin Mutual Series, K2 Advisors, Lexington Partners, Putnam Investments, Alcentra, Royce Investment Partners and Western Asset Management Company. It provides investment management and related services to retail, institutional and high-net-worth investors in jurisdictions worldwide. The company was founded by Rupert H. Johnson, Sr. in 1947 and is headquartered in San Mateo, CA.
info.description_zh: Franklin Resources, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事提供投資管理及相關服務。該公司提供各種不同品牌的服務和產品，包括但不限於 Franklin、Templeton、Legg Mason、Benefit Street Partners、Brandywine Global Investment Management、Clarion Partners、ClearBridge Investments、Fiduciary Trust Company International、Franklin Mutual Series、K2 Advisors、Lexington Partners、Putnamciary Trust Company International、Franklin Mutual Series、K2 Advisors、Lexington Partners、Putnam Investments Management、Alcentra、Royce Partners 和 Western Corporation。它為全球司法管轄區的零售、機構和高淨值投資者提供投資管理及相關服務。該公司由 Rupert H. Johnson, Sr. 於 1947 年創立，總部位於加州聖馬刁。

info.description: Carvana Co. is a holding company and an eCommerce platform, which engages in the buying and selling of used cars. The company was founded by Ernest Garcia, III, Benjamin Huston and Ryan Keeton in 2012 and is headquartered in Tempe, AZ.
info.description_zh: Carvana Co.是一家控股公司和電子商務平台，從事二手車買賣。該公司由 Ernest Garcia, III、Benjamin Huston 和 Ryan Keeton 於 2012 年創立，總部位於亞利桑那州坦佩。

info.description: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which engages in the management of luxury and upper-upscale hotels. It operates through the following geographical segments: United States, Brazil, and Canada. The company was founded in 1927 and is headquartered in Bethesda, MD.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 飯店和汽車旅館
info.description_zh: Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事豪華和高檔飯店的管理。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、巴西和加拿大。該公司成立於 1927 年，總部位於馬裡蘭州貝塞斯達。

info.description: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. engages in the provision of investment management services. It provides its services to individuals, institutional investors, retirement plans, financial intermediaries, and institutions. The firm invests in the public equity and fixed income markets across the globe. The company was founded by Thomas Rowe Price Jr. in 1937 and is headquartered in Baltimore, MD.
info.description_zh: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. 從事提供投資管理服務。它為個人、機構投資者、退休計劃、金融中介機構和機構提供服務。該公司投資於全球公共股權和固定收益市場。該公司由 Thomas Rowe Price Jr. 於 1937 年創立，總部位於馬裡蘭州巴爾的摩。

info.description: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. engages in providing products and services to help pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies. It operates through the following segments: Research Models and Services (RMS), Discovery and Safety Assessment (DSA), and Manufacturing Solutions. The Research Models and Services segment includes its insourcing solutions business and Charles River accelerator and development lab footprint. The Discovery and Safety Assessment segment offers regulatory-required safety testing of potential new drugs, vaccines, industrial and agricultural chemicals, consumer products, veterinary medicines, and medical devices. The Manufacturing Solutions segment focuses on microbial solutions and biologics solutions. The company was founded by Henry L. Foster in 1947 and is headquartered in Wilmington, MA.
info.description_zh: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. 致力於提供產品和服務來幫助製藥和生物技術公司。它透過以下部門運作：研究模型和服務（RMS）、發現和安全評估（DSA）以及製造解決方案。研究模型和服務部門包括其內包解決方案業務以及 Charles River 加速器和開發實驗室足跡。發現和安全評估部門為潛在的新藥、疫苗、工業和農業化學品、消費品、獸藥和醫療器材提供監管要求的安全測試。製造解決方案部門專注於微生物解決方案和生物製劑解決方案。該公司由 Henry L. Foster 於 1947 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州威爾明頓。

info.description: Genuine Parts Co. engages in the distribution of automotive and industrial replacement parts. It operates through the following segments: Automotive Parts Group, Industrial Parts Group, and Corporate. The Automotive Parts Group segment distributes replacement parts, other than body parts for substantially all makes and models of automobiles, trucks, and other vehicles. The Industrial Parts Group segment offers a range of industrial bearings, mechanical and fluid power transmission equipment, including hydraulic and pneumatic products, material handling components, and related parts and supplies. The company was founded by Carlyle Fraser on May 7, 1928, and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Genuine Parts Co. 從事汽車和工業替換零件的分銷。它透過以下部門運作：汽車零件部門、工業零件部門和企業部門。汽車零件集團部門為幾乎所有品牌和型號的汽車、卡車和其他車輛分銷車身零件以外的替換零件。工業零件集團部門提供一系列工業軸承、機械和流體動力傳輸設備，包括液壓和氣動產品、物料搬運組件以及相關零件和用品。該公司由凱雷·弗雷澤 (Carlyle Fraser) 於 1928 年 5 月 7 日創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Waters Corp. engages in the provision of workflow solutions involving liquid chromatography, mass spectrometry, and thermal analysis. It operates through the Waters and TA (TA Instruments) segments. The Waters segment consists of liquid chromatography instruments, mass spectrometry, and precision chemistry consumable products and services. The TA segment products and services include thermal analysis, rheometry and calorimetry instrument systems, and service sales. The company was founded by James Logan Waters in 1958 and is headquartered in Milford, MA.
info.description_zh: Waters Corp. 提供涉及液相層析、質譜和熱分析的工作流程解決方案。它透過 Waters 和 TA (TA Instruments) 部門運作。沃特世部門包括液相層析儀器、質譜儀以及精密化學消耗品和服務。 TA 部門的產品和服務包括熱分析、流變和量熱儀器系統以及服務銷售。該公司由 James Logan Waters 於 1958 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州米爾福德。

info.description: CBRE Group, Inc. engages in the provision of commercial real estate and investment services. It operates through the following segments: Advisory Services, Global Workplace Solutions, Real Estate Investments, and Corporate and Other. The Advisory Services segment provides a comprehensive range of services globally, including property leasing, property sales, mortgage services, property management, and valuation services. The Global Workplace Solutions segment includes a suite of integrated facilities management and project management solutions for major occupiers of commercial real estate. The Real Estate Investments segment consists of investment management services provided globally, development services in the United States and United Kingdom, and a service designed to help property occupiers and owners meet the growing demand for flexible office space solutions on a global basis. The Corporate and Other segment refers to the corporate overhead costs and activities from strategic non-core and non-controlling equity investments. The company was founded by Colbert Coldwell in 1906 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.description_zh: 世邦魏理仕集團 (CBRE Group, Inc.) 從事提供商業房地產和投資服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：諮詢服務部門、全球工作場所解決方案部門、房地產投資部門以及企業及其他部門。諮詢服務部門在全球範圍內提供全面的服務，包括房產租賃、房產銷售、抵押貸款服務、房產管理和估價服務。全球工作場所解決方案部門包括一套針對商業房地產主要佔用者的綜合設施管理和專案管理解決方案。房地產投資部門包括在全球提供的投資管理服務、在美國和英國的開發服務，以及旨在幫助房地產佔用者和業主滿足全球範圍內對靈活辦公空間解決方案不斷增長的需求的服務。公司及其他部門是指來自策略性非核心和非控制性股權投資的公司管理費用和活動。該公司由 Colbert Coldwell 於 1906 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: Welltower, Inc. is a health care infrastructure company, which engages in seniors housing operations, post-acute providers and health systems to fund the real estate infrastructure. The company's operating business segments include Seniors Housing Operating, Triple-Net, and Outpatient Medical. The Seniors Housing Operating segment operates properties including seniors apartments, independent living and independent supportive living, continuing care retirement communities, and assisted living, Alzheimer's dementia care and includes care homes with or without nursing. The Triple-Net segment properties offer services including independent living & supportive living (Canada), assisted living, continuing care retirement communities, Alzheimer's/dementia care and care homes with or without nursing (U.K.), and long-term/post-acute care. The Outpatient Medical segment invests in and operates outpatient medical buildings including physician offices, ambulatory surgery centers, diagnostic facilities, outpatient services and/or labs. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Toledo, OH.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Welltower, Inc. 是一家醫療保健基礎設施公司，從事老年人住房運營、急性期後醫療服務提供者和醫療系統，為房地產基礎設施提供資金。該公司的營運業務包括老年人住房運營、三網和門診醫療。老年人住房運營部門經營的物業包括老年人公寓、獨立生活和獨立支持性生活、持續護理退休社區、輔助生活、阿茲海默症癡呆護理，包括有或沒有護理的護理院。 Triple-Net 部門提供的服務包括獨立生活和支持性生活（加拿大）、輔助生活、持續照護退休社區、阿茲海默症/失智症照護和有或沒有照護的照護機構（英國）以及長期/急性期後照護。門診醫療部門投資並營運門診醫療建築，包括醫生辦公室、門診手術中心、診斷設施、門診服務和/或實驗室。該公司成立於 1970 年，總部位於俄亥俄州托萊多。

info.description: Solventum Corp. operates as a health care company. The company was founded on January 24, 2023 and is headquartered in Maplewood, MN.
info.description_zh: Solventum Corp. 是一家醫療保健公司。該公司成立於 2023 年 1 月 24 日，總部位於明尼蘇達州梅普爾伍德。

info.description: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. engages in the development, publishing, and marketing of interactive software games. Its products are designed for console systems, handheld gaming systems, and personal computers, including smart phones and tablets, and are delivered through physical retail, digital download, online platforms, and cloud streaming services. The company was founded by Ryan A. Brant in 1993 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. 從事互動軟體遊戲的開發、發行和行銷。其產品專為遊戲機系統、手持遊戲系統和個人電腦（包括智慧型手機和平板電腦）而設計，並透過實體零售、數位下載、線上平台和雲端串流服務提供。該公司由 Ryan A. Brant 於 1993 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. is a real estate investment trust, which engages in the development, acquisition, ownership, and operation of multifamily communities. It operates through the following segments: Same Store, Other Stabilized, and Development or Redevelopment. The Same Store segment refers to the operating communities that were owned and had stabilized occupancy. The Other Stabilized segment includes all other complete communities that have stabilized occupancy. The Development or Redevelopment segment consists of communities that are under construction. The company was founded by Gilbert M. Meyer in 1978 and is headquartered in Arlington, VA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: AvalonBay Communities, Inc. 是一家房地產投資信託公司，從事多戶社區的開發、收購、所有權和營運。它透過以下部門運作：同一商店部門、其他穩定部門以及開發或再開發部門。同店板塊是指自有且入住率穩定的經營社區。其他穩定部分包括所有其他擁有穩定入住率的完整社區。開發或再開發部分由正在建設中的社區組成。該公司由 Gilbert M. Meyer 於 1978 年創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州阿靈頓。

info.description: Zebra Technologies Corp. engages in the design, manufacture, and sale of automatic identification and data capture products. Its products include mobile computers, barcode scanners, radio frequency identification devices readers, specialty printers for barcode labeling and personal identification, real-time location systems, accessories and supplies, such as self-adhesive labels and other consumables, and software utilities and applications. It also provides services such as maintenance, technical support, repair, and managed and professional services, including cloud-based subscriptions. It operates through Asset Intelligence and Tracking and Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segments. The Asset Intelligence and Tracking segment is involved in barcode and card printing, location solutions, supplies, and services. The Enterprise Visibility and Mobility segment focuses on mobile computing, data capture, and RFID. The company was founded by Edward L. Kaplan and Gerhard Cless in 1969 and is headquartered in Lincolnshire, IL.
info.description_zh: Zebra Technologies Corp. 從事自動辨識和資料擷取產品的設計、製造和銷售。其產品包括行動數據終端、條碼掃描器、無線射頻識別設備讀取器、條碼標籤和個人識別專用印表機、即時定位系統、配件和耗材（例如不乾膠標籤和其他耗材）以及軟體實用程式和應用程式。它還提供維護、技術支援、維修以及託管和專業服務等服務，包括基於雲端的訂閱。它透過資產智慧和追蹤以及企業可見性和移動性部門進行運作。資產智慧和追蹤部門涉及條碼和卡片列印、定位解決方案、用品和服務。企業可視性和移動性部分專注於行動運算、資料擷取和 RFID。該公司由 Edward L. Kaplan 和 Gerhard Cless 於 1969 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州林肯郡。

info.description: Regency Centers Corp. operates as a real estate investment trust, which engages in the ownership, operation, and development of retail shopping centers. Its portfolio includes thriving properties merchandised with highly productive grocers, restaurants, service providers, and best-in-class retailers that connect to its neighborhoods, communities, and customers. The company was founded by Martin Edward Stein, Sr. and Joan Wellhouse Newton in 1963 and is headquartered in Jacksonville, FL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 零售
info.description_zh: Regency Centers Corp. 以房地產投資信託公司經營，從事零售購物中心的所有權、營運和開發。其投資組合包括與高生產力的雜貨店、餐廳、服務提供者和一流零售商銷售的蓬勃發展的房產，這些零售商與鄰裡、社區和客戶建立了聯繫。該公司由 Martin Edward Stein, Sr. 和 Joan Wellhouse Newton 於 1963 年創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州傑克遜維爾。

info.description: Bio-Techne Corp. is a global life sciences company providing innovative tools and bioactive reagents for research and clinical diagnostic communities. Its products assist scientific investigations into biological processes and the nature and progress of specific diseases. It operates through the Protein Sciences, and Diagnostics and Spatial Biology segments. The Protein Sciences segment develops and manufactures purified proteins, and reagent solutions. The Diagnostics and Spatial Biology segment develops and manufactures diagnostic products. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Minneapolis, MN.
info.description_zh: Bio-Techne Corp. 是一家全球生命科學公司，為研究和臨床診斷界提供創新工具和生物活性試劑。其產品有助於對生物過程以及特定疾病的性質和進展進行科學研究。它透過蛋白質科學、診斷和空間生物學部門運作。蛋白質科學部門開發和製造純化蛋白質和試劑溶液。診斷和空間生物學部門開發和製造診斷產品。該公司成立於 1976 年，總部位於明尼蘇達州明尼阿波利斯。

info.description: Invitation Homes, Inc. engages in the acquisition, renovation, leasing, and operation of single-family homes as rental properties, including single-family homes in planned unit developments. Its services include property management, selection of homes, maintenance program, and online payment. The company was founded by Marcus Ridgway, Dallas Tanner, and Brad Greiwe in 2012 and is headquartered in Dallas, TX.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 住宅
info.description_zh: Invitation Homes, Inc. 從事單戶住宅作為出租物業的收購、翻新、租賃和運營，包括計劃開發的單戶住宅。其服務包括物業管理、選房、維護計劃和線上支付。該公司由 Marcus Ridgway、Dallas Tanner 和 Brad Greiwe 於 2012 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州達拉斯。

info.description: NRG Energy, Inc. engages in the production, sale, and distribution of energy and energy services. It operates through the following segments: Texas, East, West/Services/Other, Vivint Smart Home, and Corporate Activities. The Texas segment includes all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in Texas, other than Cottonwood. The East segment engages in all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in the East. The West/Services/Other segment is focused on all activities related to customer, plant and market operations in the West and Canada, and activities related to the Cottonwood facility and other investments. The Vivint Smart Home segment is a smart home platform that provides customers with technology, products and services to create a smarter, greener, safer home. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 獨立電力生產商
info.description_zh: NRG Energy, Inc. 從事能源和能源服務的生產、銷售和分銷。該公司透過以下部門營運：德州、東部、西部/服務/其他部門、Vivint 智慧家居部門和企業活動部門。德克薩斯州分部包括與德克薩斯州客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動（三葉楊除外）。東部部門從事與東部客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動。西部/服務/其他部門專注於與西部和加拿大的客戶、工廠和市場運營相關的所有活動，以及與卡頓伍德設施和其他投資相關的活動。 Vivint智慧家庭部門是一個智慧家庭平台，為客戶提供技術、產品和服務，以創造更智慧、更環保、更安全的家庭。該公司成立於 1989 年，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, and marketing of orthopedic reconstructive products. The firm also offers sports medicine, biologics, extremities, and trauma products, spine, craniomaxillofacial, and thoracic products, office-based technologies, dental implants, and related surgical products. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, Europe Middle East and Africa, and Asia Pacific. The Americas segment consists of the U.S. and includes other North, Central and South American markets. The Europe Middle East and Africa segment includes France, Germany, Italy, Spain, and the United Kingdom. The Asia Pacific segment refers to the key markets such as Japan, China, Australia, New Zealand, Korea, Taiwan, India, Thailand, Singapore, Hong Kong, and Malaysia. The company was founded by Justin O. Zimmer in 1927 and is headquartered in Warsaw, IN.
info.description_zh: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. 從事骨科重建產品的設計、製造和行銷。該公司還提供運動醫學、生物製品、四肢和創傷產品、脊椎、顱顏面和胸部產品、辦公室技術、牙科植體和相關外科產品。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、歐洲、中東和非洲以及亞太地區。美洲部分包括美國以及其他北美、中美和南美市場。歐洲、中東和非洲部分包括法國、德國、義大利、西班牙和英國。亞太地區是指日本、中國、澳洲、紐西蘭、韓國、台灣、印度、泰國、新加坡、香港和馬來西亞等主要市場。該公司由 Justin O. Zimmer 於 1927 年創立，總部位於印第安納州華沙。

info.description: CDW Corp. engages in the provision of information technology solutions to small, medium, and large business, government, education, and healthcare customers. It operates through the following segments: Corporate, Small Business, Public, and Other. The Corporate segment serves US private sector business customers with more than 250 employees. The Small Business segment focuses on the US private sector business customers with up to 250 employees. The Public segment includes government agencies and education and healthcare institutions. The Other segment focuses on CDW UK and Canada. The company was founded by Michael P. Krasny in 1984 and is headquartered in Vernon Hills, IL.
info.description_zh: CDW Corp. 致力於為小型、中型和大型企業、政府、教育和醫療保健客戶提供資訊科技解決方案。它透過以下部門運作：企業部門、小型企業部門、公共部門和其他部門。企業部門為美國私人企業客戶提供服務，擁有 250 多名員工。小型企業部門專注於擁有最多 250 名員工的美國私人企業客戶。公共部門包括政府機構以及教育和醫療機構。其他部分則重點關注 CDW 英國和加拿大。該公司由 Michael P. Krasny 於 1984 年創立，總部位於伊利諾伊州弗農希爾斯。

info.description: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc. is an investment holding company, which engages in broker or dealer and proprietary trading businesses. It offers custody and service accounts for hedge and mutual funds, exchange-traded funds, registered investment advisors, proprietary trading groups, introducing brokers, and individual investors. The company was founded by Thomas Pechy Peterffy in 1977 and is headquartered in Greenwich, CT.
info.description_zh: Interactive Brokers Group, Inc.是一家投資控股公司，從事經紀商或交易商以及自營交易業務。它為對沖基金和共同基金、交易所交易基金、註冊投資顧問、自營交易集團、介紹經紀人和個人投資者提供託管和服務帳戶。該公司由 Thomas Pechy Peterffy 於 1977 年創立，總部位於康乃狄克州格林威治。

info.description: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. engages in the provision of design and development of integrated circuits and electronic devices. It operates through the following geographical segments: Americas, Asia, EMEA, and Japan. The company was founded by Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli, Gudmundur A. Hjartarson, K. Bobby Chao, and K. Charles Janac in June 1988 and is headquartered in San Jose, CA.
info.description_zh: Cadence Design Systems, Inc. 從事積體電路和電子設備的設計和開發。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：美洲、亞洲、歐洲、中東和非洲和日本。該公司由 Alberto Sangiovanni-Vincentelli、Gudmundur A. Hjartarson、K. Bobby Chao 和 K. Charles Janac 於 1988 年 6 月創立，總部位於加州聖荷西。

info.description: Strategy, Inc. engages in the provision of enterprise analytics and mobility software. The firm designs, develops, markets, and sells software platforms through licensing arrangements and cloud-based subscriptions and related services. Its product packages include Hyper. The company was founded by Michael J. Saylor and Sanjeev K. Bansal on November 17, 1989, and is headquartered in Tysons Corner, VA.
info.description_zh: Strategy, Inc. 從事提供企業分析和行動軟體。該公司透過授權安排和基於雲端的訂閱及相關服務來設計、開發、行銷和銷售軟體平台。其產品包包括 Hyper。該公司由 Michael J. Saylor 和 Sanjeev K. Bansal 於 1989 年 11 月 17 日創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州泰森斯角。

info.description: Apollo Global Management, Inc. provides asset management services. It offers its clients excess return at every point along the risk-reward spectrum from investment grade to private equity with a focus on three business strategies: yield, hybrid, and equity. It operates through following segments: Asset Management, Retirement Services and Principal Investing. The Asset Management segment focuses on credit and equity investing strategies. The Retirement Services and Principal Investing segment consists of realized performance fee income, realized investment income from balance sheet investments, and certain allocable expenses related to corporate functions supporting the entire company. The company was founded by Marc Rowan in 1990 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Apollo Global Management, Inc. 提供資產管理服務。它為客戶提供從投資等級到私募股權的風險回報範圍內每個點的超額回報，重點關註三種業務策略：收益、混合和股權。它透過以下部門運作：資產管理部門、退休服務部門和本金投資部門。資產管理部門專注於信貸和股權投資策略。退休服務和本金投資部門包括已實現的績效費收入、資產負債表投資的已實現投資收入以及與支持整個公司的公司職能相關的某些可分配費用。該公司由 Marc Rowan 於 1990 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。
